name: ProfileItemSubType
summary: The ProfileItemSubType class contains the information of one profile item sub type (id, label, parameter string and bitmap name). A profile item can contain a maximum of 10 profile item sub types.

constructors.name: ProfileItemSubType
constructors.summary: Initializes a new instance of the ProfileItemSubType class

properties.name: BitmapName
properties.summary: Gets a value of the property BitmapName.

properties.name: Label
properties.summary: Gets a value of the property Label.

properties.name: ParameterString
properties.summary: Gets a value of the property ParameterString.

properties.name: SubTypeId
properties.summary: Gets a value of the property SubTypeId.
